overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic sports car driving through Night City. The vehicle navigates dense urban canyons, covered commercial arcades, and bright boulevards with dramatic lighting transitions between shadowed underpasses and sunlit streets. The environment features heavy neon signage, palm trees, and cyberpunk architecture.

approaching covered commercial arcade with overhead structure

large vertical advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a futuristic sports car driving through a dense urban canyon. Tall buildings line both sides, including a yellow apartment block on the left and a green glass building on the right. An elevated highway structure looms ahead as the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, passing a green sedan while navigating the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial arcade with neon signage

events.description: entering covered street section with reduced natural light and increased neon illumination
navigating around slower moving traffic and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: cruising through a covered street section, passing under metal roof structures and neon signs

notable_agents.action: white van driving in the opposite direction on the left side

entered.detail: overhead metal framework covering the street creating a semi-enclosed arcade
large green illuminated corporate signage mounted on building facade
vertical advertisement screen with purple and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The car enters a covered commercial arcade where natural light is replaced by artificial neon illumination. A large metal roof structure covers the street overhead, while the softsys neon sign glows green in the distance. The vehicle navigates moderate traffic including a white van approaching from the left, passing various digital billboards and storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial boulevard with palm trees and heavy signage

events.description: exiting covered area into bright direct sunlight, dramatic increase in brightness
navigating through busy intersection with cross traffic and multiple vehicles

agents.ego_description: accelerating on a wide sunlit boulevard, weaving through traffic and passing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: brown sedan merging into traffic from the left side

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk, indicating a warmer climate zone
bright yellow building with large commercial signage and glass storefronts
elevated transit structure running parallel above the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered arcade into bright midday sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide commercial boulevard lined with palm trees. The yellow commercial building stands prominently on the right while an overhead monorail track runs above the street. The car accelerates through a busy intersection, navigating around a brown sedan merging from the left as pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

events.description: entering deep shadow under large concrete overpass, visibility reduced
slight steering adjustment to navigate through narrower underpass section

agents.ego_description: driving through a shadowed underpass area with reduced visibility, following traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead under the overpass in the same lane

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead casting deep shadows on the road
building with red facade and industrial architectural details

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and enters a large concrete overpass, transitioning from bright sunlight to deep shadow. The massive infrastructure overhead blocks most of the sky, creating a low-light environment. A red industrial building appears on the right as the car follows a dark sedan through the underpass, navigating the enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban street with mixed residential and commercial

events.description: exiting underpass into mixed lighting with partial sunlight and building shadows
overtaking slower vehicle on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrower industrial street with weathered buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near building entrance

entered.detail: aged residential building with worn exterior facade and multiple windows
large HVAC equipment and exhaust systems mounted on building rooftop

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass into mixed lighting, the car enters a narrower industrial street with weathered architecture. A weathered apartment block stands on the left while industrial ventilation units are visible on rooftops to the right. The vehicle overtakes slower traffic while a pedestrian walks along the sidewalk, navigating through the gritty urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a futuristic sports car as it transitions from a shadowed urban canyon through a neon-lit arcade and finally into a sun-drenched commercial boulevard. It begins by accelerating through a dense corridor of tall buildings, passing a yellow apartment block and a green glass tower before gliding under a looming elevated highway. As the vehicle enters a covered commercial arcade, the natural light vanishes, replaced by the artificial glow of digital billboards and a distant green neon sign. The scene then opens abruptly into bright midday sunlight as the car emerges from the tunnel onto a wide street lined with palm trees and an overhead monorail track. Finally, the vehicle navigates a busy intersection past a prominent yellow building and merging traffic, moving deeper into the vibrant, open cityscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a bright open road into a shadowed urban underpass and finally into a gritty industrial district. It begins by approaching a massive concrete overpass, where the bright sunlight abruptly vanishes as the car enters a deep, low-light environment beneath the heavy infrastructure. As the vehicle follows a dark sedan past a red industrial building, the enclosed urban canyon creates a sense of compression before the scene opens back up into mixed lighting. The camera then shifts into a narrower street characterized by weathered architecture, passing a dilapidated apartment block and rooftop ventilation units. Finally, the vehicle overtakes slower traffic and passes a lone pedestrian, fully immersing the viewer in the weathered, industrial atmosphere of the city.
